completed_weeks.title: Infrastructure & Scaffolding
completed_weeks.summary: Set up project infrastructure: directory structure, dependencies, tooling (pytest, ruff, mypy), GitHub Actions CI, data loader, preprocessor (ConvexHullClipper, DeltaTGate), and basic utilities.

completed_weeks.title: Movement Quality Metrics (M4, M2)
completed_weeks.summary: Implemented velocity inference with delta-t gating, run detection, OBR90 (Off-Ball Runs per 90), and OIRC (Off-Ball Impact Run Coefficient). Added comprehensive tests.

completed_weeks.title: Receiving Quality Metrics (M5, M6, M3)
completed_weeks.summary: Implemented RBTL (Receipts Behind The Line), RUP (Receipts Under Pressure with 360 fallback), and BRPC (Ball Receipt Pressure Counter). Added geometry helpers: half-space polygon, forward cone, lane-open check. Added nearest_opponent_distance preprocessor.

completed_weeks.title: Spatial + Temporal Metrics (M7, M1, M8, M9)
completed_weeks.summary: Built Karun Singh 12x8 xT model. Implemented SCI (Space Control Improvement via Voronoi), SC (Screen Count with local/global shift), LPC (Layoff Pause Coefficient with xT improvement check), and CBI (Cutback Intelligence with run alignment and passing-lane check). Added voronoi_areas() helper with bbox clipping.

completed_weeks.title: Integration, Pipeline & Handoff
completed_weeks.summary: Built full pipeline orchestrator: compute_all_metrics(match_id) → DataFrame[player_id, M1..M9]. Added parquet caching to data/processed/. Wrote integration tests (7 tests, all passing). Created debugging notebook with Voronoi diagrams, half-space overlays, xT heatmaps, and metric summary tables.

deliverable: 9-metric DataFrame per match for Person 2's fuzzy engine
next_steps: Handoff to Person 2 (Week 6): fuzzy inference engine with Mamdani control system
